description:
With the pagina EPUB-Checker one can easily validate ebooks in the EPUB format. The test mechanisms of the EPUB-Checker are based on the official open-source [EPUBCheck tools](https://github.com/IDPF/epubcheck).

pagina EPUB-Checker capsules these tools and offers some additional features, like:

* Graphical user interface (like a "real" program)
* Drag and drop to validate
* Ability to validate expanded/unzipped EPUBs
    * Expanded folders are automatically archived to an EPUB file upon validation
    * The generated EPUB file will be saved if valid
summary: With the pagina EPUB-Checker one can easily validate ebooks in the EPUB format. The test mechanisms of the EPUB-Checker are based on the official open-source EPUBCheck tools.
author: pagina,  Tobias Fischer
